summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for ConnectJob production readiness implementation. All 8 critical features tested successfully including security hardening, input validation, rate limiting, and health monitoring.
passed_tests: Health check endpoint returns status, timestamp, version, database status, uptime
Input validation on /api/auth/register rejects email without @ symbol
Input validation on /api/auth/register rejects password less than 8 chars
Input validation on /api/auth/login requires email field
Rate limiting works on auth routes (20 requests per 15min)
Stripe webhook endpoint /api/payments/webhook exists and validates signatures
CORS headers are properly set with Access-Control-Allow-Origin, Methods, Headers
